rationale: Diff under review contains only execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json) and no changes to docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md. The PRD restructure required by the bead is not present in this diff and cannot be evaluated.

findings.summary: No changes to docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md present in diff; bead requires Problem section restructure (6 clusters incl. LLM physics), Goals updates, Non-goals sharpening, and FEAT blurb updates.
Result.json references result_rev bebb231b which is the PRD commit, but the diff shown for review only includes the execution evidence files, not the PRD changes themselves.
